mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, product_id, product_name, amount, user_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{amount}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

UPDATE orders SET wechat_trade_no = #{wechatTradeNo}, wechat_transaction_id = #{wechatTransactionId}, status = 'SUCCESS', pay_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.username, u.email FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, u.username, u.email FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.refund_status = #{refundStatus} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET refund_status = #{refundStatus}, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET refund_status = 'REFUNDED', refund_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders GROUP BY status
SELECT refund_status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders GROUP BY refund_status
SELECT status, SUM(amount) as total FROM orders GROUP BY status
